markdownRemark.html:
Awesome macOS open source applications

List of awesome open source applications for macOS. This list contains a lot of native, and cross-platform apps. The main goal of this repository is to find free open source apps and start contributing. Feel free to contribute to the list, any suggestions are welcome!

To receive all new or popular applications you can join our telegram chanel.

Support

Hey friend! Help me out for a couple of !

Languages

You can see in which language an app is written. Currently there are following languages:

  • - C language.
  • - C++ language.
  • - C# language.
  • - Clojure language.
  • - CoffeeScript language.
  • - CSS language.
  • - Go language.
  • - Elm language.
  • - Haskell language.
  • - JavaScript language.
  • - Lua language.
  • - Objective-C language.
  • - Python language.
  • - Ruby language.
  • - Rust language.
  • - Swift language.
  • - TypeScript language.

Applications

Audio

  • AUHoststars85 - Application which hosts AudioUnits v3 using AVFoundation API.
  • Audacitystars4.9k - Free, open source, cross-platform audio software
  • Aural Playerstars273 - Aural Player is a audio player application for the macOS platform. Inspired by the classic Winamp player for Windows, it is designed to be to-the-point and easy to use.
  • AutoMutestars115 - Automatically mute the sound when headphones disconnect / Mac awake from sleep.
  • Background Musicstars9.4k - Background Music, a macOS audio utility: automatically pause your music, set individual apps' volumes and record system audio.
  • BlackHolestars5.2k - BlackHole is a modern macOS virtual audio driver that allows applications to pass audio to other applications with zero additional latency.
  • CAMstars32 - macOS camera recording using ffmpeg
  • Clementinestars2.9k - Clementine is a modern music player and library organizer for Windows, Linux and macOS.
  • Cog - Cog is an open source audio player for macOS. The basic layout is a single-paned playlist interface with two retractable drawers, one for navigating the user's music folders and another for viewing audio file properties, like bitrate.
  • Karaoke Foreverstars81 - Host awesome karaoke parties where everyone can queue songs from their phone's browser. Plays MP3+G and MP4 with WebGL visualizations.
  • LocalRadiostars270 - LocalRadio is software for listening to "Software-Defined Radio" on your Mac and mobile devices.
  • Lyricismstars63 - macOS app to show you lyric what currently iTunes or Spotify is playing.
  • LyricsXstars2.8k - Lyrics for iTunes, Spotify and Vox.
  • MPVstars15k - Lightweight, highly configurable media player.
  • MonitorControlstars7.7k - Control your external monitor brightness, contrast or volume directly from a menulet or with keyboard native keys.
  • Mous Playerstars65 - Simple yet powerful audio player for BSD/Linux/macOS.
  • Music Barstars130 - Music Bar is macOS application that places music controls right in your menu bar.
  • NoiseBuddystars593 - Control the listening mode on your AirPods Pro in the Touch Bar or Menu Bar.
  • PlayStatusstars64 - PlayStatus is a macOS app that allows the control of Spotify and iTunes music playback from the menu bar.
  • Scope - Audio Oscilloscope
  • ShazamScrobblerstars88 - Scrobble vinyl, radios, movies to Last.fm.
  • Sonorastars926 - Minimal, beautifully designed music player for macOS.
  • SpotMenustars2.6k - Spotify and iTunes in your menu bar.
  • SpotSpotstars112 - Spotify mini-player for macOS.
  • Suohaistars99 - Audio input/output source lock for macOS.
  • Tickeysstars1.1k - Instant audio feedback for typing. macOS version.
  • Tunerstars23 - Musical Instrument Tuner
  • [Un]MuteMicstars102 - macOS app to mute & unmute the input volume of your microphone. Perfect for podcasters.
  • eqMac2stars3.5k - System-Wide Equalizer for the Mac.
  • fre:acstars547 - The fre:ac audio converter project.
  • iTunes-Volume-Controlstars226 - This app allows you to control the iTunes volume using volume up and volume down hotkeys.
  • jmcstars434 - jmc is new macOS media organizer.
  • shairport-syncstars4.7k - macOS/Linux/FreeBSD/OpenBSD Airplay audio receiver.
  • waveSDRstars146 - macOS native desktop Software Defined Radio application using the RTL-SDR USB device.

Backup

  • Mackupstars11.1k - Keep your application settings in sync (macOS/Linux).
  • Syncaliciousstars195 - Keeping multiple macOS preferences in sync can be painful, but it shouldn't be.
  • UrBackupstars339 - UrBackup is Client/Server network backup for Windows, macOS and Linux.
  • shallow-backupstars738 - Easily create lightweight documentation of installed applications, dotfiles, and more.

Browser

  • Beaker Browserstars6.2k - Beaker is an experimental peer-to-peer Web browser.
  • Brave Browserstars9.4k - Brave browser for Desktop and Laptop computers running Windows, macOS, and Linux.
  • Chromium - Chromium is an open-source browser project that aims to build a safer, faster, and more stable way for all users to experience the web.
  • Fathomecatstars413 - Experimental web browser with minimalistic design. Running Windows, macOS and Linux.
  • Finickystars1.6k - Always opens the right browser.
  • Heliumstars3.6k - Floating browser window for macOS.
  • Pennywisestars3.3k - Pennywise opens any website or media in a small floating window that remains on top of all other applications. It's a great alternative to Helium.
  • Plashstars1.4k - Make any website your desktop wallpaper.
  • browserosaurusstars476 - macOS tool that prompts you to choose a browser when opening a link.
  • otter-browserstars1.3k - Otter Browser aims to recreate the best aspects of the classic Opera (12.x) UI using Qt5.
  • seb-macstars52 - Safe Exam Browser for macOS and iOS.

Chat

  • Beagle IMstars93 - Powerful XMPP client with support for file transfer, VoIP and end-to-end encryption.
  • ChitChatstars1.9k - Native Mac app wrapper for WhatsApp Web.
  • Electronic WeChatstars13.8k - Better WeChat on macOS and Linux.
  • Elementstars6.6k - Element is a collaboration app (currently Electron) for the Matrix protocol.
  • Franzstars4k - Franz is messaging application for services like WhatsApp, Slack, Messenger and many more.
  • Google Allo for Desktopstars113 - Native macOS & Windows desktop app for Google Allo.
  • GroupMestars80 - Unofficial GroupMe App.
  • MessagesHistoryBrowserstars56 - macOS application to comfortably browse and search through your Messages.app history.
  • RocketChatstars1.1k - Free open source chat system for teams. An alternative to Slack that can also be self hosted.
  • Seaglassstars438 - A truly native Matrix client for macOS.
  • Signal Desktopstars10.9k - Electron app that links with your Signal Android or Signal iOS app.
  • Telegramstars3.2k - Source code of Telegram for macOS on Swift.
  • Telegram Desktopstars15.5k - Telegram Desktop messaging app.
  • Textualstars1.7k - Textual is an IRC client for macOS.
  • Torchat-Macstars74 - TorChat for Mac is a macOS native and unofficial port of torchat.
  • WhatsAppBarstars31 - Send WhatsApp message from menu bar.
  • Wire Desktopstars972 - Standalone Electron app for the chatapp Wire.

Cryptocurrency

  • Balance Openstars278 - App for all the world’s currencies.
  • CoinBarstars113 - macOS menu bar application for tracking crypto coin prices.
  • Copaystars32 - A secure bitcoin wallet platform for both desktop and mobile devices.
  • Crypto Barstars385 - macOS menu bar application built with Electron.
  • Float coinstars5 - Native menu bar app with floating window and support for many Exchanges.

Database

  • DB Browser for SQLitestars14.8k - SQLite database management GUI.
  • DBeaverstars20.5k - Universal database tool and SQL client.

  • Postbirdstars1.1k - PostgreSQL GUI client for macOS.
  • Postgres.appstars5.7k - The easiest way to get started with PostgreSQL on the Mac.
  • Redis Desktop Managerstars18.2k - Cross-platform open source database management tool for Redis ®
  • Redis.appstars317 - The easiest way to get started with Redis on the Mac.
  • Robo 3Tstars8.6k - Robo 3T (formerly Robomongo) is the free lightweight GUI for MongoDB enthusiasts.
  • Sequel Acestars3k - Sequel Ace is a fast, easy-to-use Mac database management application for working with MySQL & MariaDB databases.
  • Sequel Prostars8.3k - MySQL/MariaDB database management for macOS.

  • reventloustars24 - Personal database as an information management system.

Development

  • Apache Netbeansstars1.6k - Apache NetBeans is an IDE, Tooling Platform and Application Framework suitable for development in Java, JavaScript, PHP, HTML5, CSS, and more.

  • Layout Designer for UICollectionViewstars1.2k - A simple but powerful tool that helps you make complex layouts for UICollectionView.

  • GithubListenerstars19 - Simple app that will notify about new commits to watched repositories.
  • GithubNotifystars16 - Simple macOS app to alert you when you have unread GitHub notifications.

  • TeamStatus-for-GitHubstars43 - macOS status bar application for tracking code review process within the team.

JSON Parsing

  • JSON Mapperstars16 - Simple macOS app to generate Swift Object Mapper classes from JSON.
  • JSON to Model classstars28 - Template based highly customizable macOS app to generate classes from JSON string, supports many languages.
  • JSONExportstars4.5k - Desktop application for macOS which enables you to export JSON objects as model classes with their associated constructors, utility methods, setters and getters in your favorite language.
  • j2sstars211 - macOS app to convert JSON objects into Swift structs (currently targets Swift 4 and Codable).

Other Development

  • Boopstars1.8k - A scriptable scratchpad for developers.
  • ChefInspectorstars5 - Node and Attribute viewer for Chef
  • MQTTXstars978 - An elegant Cross-platform MQTT 5.0 desktop client.

Web Development

  • Mockup Generatorstars270 - Mockup Generator is a macOS app built with AngularJS/Electron that sits in your menu bar allowing you to capture screenshots of your favourite websites and wrap them in device mock-ups.

  • SimpleLocalize CLIstars21 - Open source tool for managing i18n keys in software projects.

  • Localization Editorstars1.1k - Simple macOS editor app to help you manage iOS app localizations by allowing you to edit all the translations side by side.

  • PushNotificationsstars1.6k - macOS app to test push notifications on iOS and Android.
  • ResignToolstars321 - This is an app for macOS that can (re)sign apps and bundle them into ipa files that are ready to be installed on an iOS device.

  • Xcodes.appstars717 - The easiest way to install and switch between multiple versions of Xcode.
  • calabash-launcherstars29 - iOS Calabash Launcher is a macOS app that helps you run and manage Calabash tests on your Mac.
  • iOS Images Extractorstars1.8k - iOS Images Extractor is a Mac app to normalize, decode, and extract images from iOS apps.
  • iSimulatorstars972 - iSimulator is a GUI utility to control the Simulator and manage the app installed on the simulator.

Downloader

  • Extream Download Managerstars2.5k - a powerful tool to increase download speeds up to 500%
  • Get Itstars488 - Native macOS video/audio downloader. Think of it as a youtube downloader that works on many sites.
  • Motrixstars25.9k - A full-featured download manager.
  • Pillagerstars60 - macOS Video Downloader written in Swift and Objective-C.
  • YouTube Downloader for macOSstars188 - Simple menu bar app to download YouTube movies on your Mac. I wrote this as a test project to learn more about app development on macOS.
  • udemy-downloader-guistars4.9k - desktop application for downloading Udemy Courses.

Editors

CSV

JSON

Markdown

Extensions
